$description: BIM ASSEMBLIES token category — anchored to IFC 4.3 IfcElementAssembly. Hierarchical compositions of elements.

$value.description: Decomposable element comprising multiple sub-elements (truss, frame, ladder, slab system). Use for BOM-style hierarchies.
Site-scale features: trees, parking aisles, signage. Useful for property-manager BIM where the building exists within site context.
Tenant fixtures and furnishings. Particularly relevant for FM workflows over commercial leasing.
